title: Operation Engineer
company: WCA Walldorf Consulting GmbH Latvijas filiāle

summary.lv: WCA Walldorf Consulting meklē Operation Engineer IPG komandā — atbalstīt klientus Identity & Access Management un IT drošības risinājumu jomā.
summary.en: WCA Walldorf Consulting is looking for an Operation Engineer to join the IPG team, supporting major customers with Identity & Access Management and IT security solutions.
